name: Mocha Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon instant coffee powder dissolved in hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
3. Melt butter and chocolate in a saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in sugar and dissolved coffee powder until smooth. Let stand for 10 minutes, until just warm to the touch.
5. Beat eggs into the mixture until smooth. Add flour and 1 cup of walnuts (if using) until combined.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and sprinkle remaining walnuts on top.
7. Bake in a preheating oven at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack. Cut into thirds lengthwise and tenths crosswise.
